name: Host Directory Bug Fix Live Test Cycle
description: Test-owned host-directory bug-fix playbook for mapped local workspace proofs.
outcome: A local host-directory workspace is updated with a minimal safe bug fix and verified without git.

definition.process_instructions: The live-test host developer reproduces the reported bug directly in the mapped host-directory workspace, adds or updates a deterministic regression check, and implements the minimal safe fix. The live-test host QA specialist verifies the local workspace result and nearby edge cases. The live-test host reviewer performs the final review. Persist substantive output in the host-directory workspace, not only handoffs.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this host-directory bug-fix workflow should accomplish

parameters.name: bug_report
parameters.description: Description of the bug to fix

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: In Review
columns.description: Primary work is complete and under review.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: fix
stages.goal: The mapped host-directory workspace contains the minimal fix and regression check.

stages.name: test
stages.goal: QA validates the mapped host-directory result.

stages.name: review
stages.goal: Reviewer approves the local workspace change.

checkpoints.name: fix
checkpoints.goal: The host-directory bug is fixed with a deterministic regression check.
checkpoints.entry_criteria: The bug report is available and the host directory is mounted.

checkpoints.name: test
checkpoints.goal: QA confirms the local workspace behavior.

checkpoints.name: review
checkpoints.goal: A reviewer verdict exists for the host-directory change.
